text: Introduction This proposal outlines the terms and structure for our Executive Growth Partnership. The goal is to get your feedback and agreement in principle. Once you’re comfortable with these terms, we’ll prepare the final agreement. The idea is simple: we work together to grow BuiltByRays™, save money, and create lasting value — with a payment structure that fits smoothly into your contractor payroll process and avoids large, unexpected lump sums. 🔆 Accessibility & Work Style I work asynchronously due to disabilities. You might not hear from me daily or during standard business hours. There may be stretches with little direct communication, followed by periods of intensive productivity where I deliver the equivalent of months of work in a short timeframe. This is part of my working style and is agreed upon as part of our arrangement. 💳 Compensation & Payment Terms Base Retainer: Fixed weekly amount for core services, with an automatic annual increase of CPI + 2% (or flat 5%) to cover inflation and my growing expertise. Paid through your regular contractor payroll schedule. Weekly Buffer Contribution: $250 per week (non-refundable) to maintain a $1,000 monthly buffer. Performance Bonus — Growth: 5% of gross revenue above an agreed baseline gross (suggested starting point: $500,000 annual gross). Reviewed annually and adjusted if needed. Paid in prorated weekly amounts. Direct Savings Bonus: 20% of the first year’s documented savings from any cost reduction I directly achieve. For example, saving $14,000 in taxes would result in a one-time payment of $2,800. Intangible Value Bonus: For valuable but less tangible results (e.g., improved client retention, increased brand value), we will assign a dollar value and pay 15% of that value over 2–5 years, in manageable weekly installments. Multi-Year Continuation: Baselines, bonus percentages, and valuations reviewed annually to remain fair and aligned with growth. Audit & Verification: Access to financial and operational data for accurate calculations. Survival Clause: Earned bonuses will continue to be paid for their agreed term, even if the agreement ends. 📊 Reporting & Payment Adjustment Quarterly Impact Summary – provided within 15 days after each quarter: - Gross revenue vs. baseline and calculated growth bonus - Documented savings with proof - Intangible value updates - Progress on projects and roadmap Annual Review – at year-end: - Reset or adjust baseline - Confirm ongoing payout schedules - Set next year’s targets Quarterly Payment Adjustments – process: 1. Weekly payments will include estimated bonuses and savings spread over 18 months. 2. Each quarter, actual performance is compared to estimates. 3. If ahead of plan, weekly payments increase proportionally. 4. If behind, weekly payments decrease proportionally. 5. Ensures payments track results without large one-time bills. ✅ What We’ve Already Delivered Website — $12,500 FB Community Growth — $2,000 Google Business Setup — $1,500 Domain Setup — $500 Email Setup — $1,500 Strategic Brand Audit — $5,000 Process Mapping — $6,000 Operational Prep — $7,500 Financial Baseline — $3,500 Total Delivered Value: $40,000+ 🔄 What’s in Progress Social Media Launch — $6,000 SOP Development — $9,000 Advertising Readiness — $12,000 KPI Dashboard — $5,000 Finalizing Tax Audit — estimated $14,000 in savings and possible refund Total In-Progress Value: $46,000+ 🚀 Long-Term Projects Custom Client App — $45,000 Brand Expansion — $10,000 Automation & AI Tools — $15,000 Partnership Development — $7,500 Advanced Advertising — $15,000 Projected Long-Term Value: $92,500+ 🛣 Roadmap Weeks 1–4: Complete tax audit, website launch, social media kickoff, FB growth, KPI baseline Weeks 5–10: First ad campaigns, SOP creation, feedback loop Months 3–4: Expand ads, refine SOPs, MVP client app Months 5–8: Launch app, integrate automation Months 9–12: Service tier expansion, partnerships, advanced ads Months 13–18: Scale operations — hire for both teams 📈 ROI Projection — Estimate Figures below are estimates based on assumptions about performance and should not be taken as guaranteed results. The target is at least $3 in value for every $1 invested. Total Paid (18 months): ~$68,279 Minimum Expected Return: $204,837+ Revenue Growth: ~$150,000+ Direct Savings: $25,000 + $14,000 from tax audit Brand Value Increase: $30,000+ Net Gain: $136,558+ 🤝 Partnership Commitment I am a non-legal partner: - I succeed when you succeed - Fully invested in your growth - Share in revenue gains and savings - Oversee hiring for both teams as growth allows 💵 Payment Accommodation — First Month For the first four weeks: Weekly payments of $250 plus the $250 weekly buffer contribution, totaling $500 per week, for onboarding. After week four, payments transition to the standard weekly rate, which will include estimated bonuses/savings spread over 18 months. A detailed estimated payment schedule will be provided for review. Acceptance By signing below, you agree to these terms and authorize autopay per the agreed schedule.
